steps: Anesthetize the animals following this protocol. See Whole colony fixation V.1 .
Fix the animals in 4% PFA Overnight at Room temperature . See Whole colony fixation V.1 .
Clean the slide with the colony of your interest. Cleaning colonial ascidians .
Place samples in PBST-SC.
Shake Overnight at Room temperature .
Rinse once with 1x PBS.
Wash twice in 3.3x PBS for 00:30:00 .
Rinse quickly 3 times with 1x PBS and then leave in 1x PBS for 01:00:00 .
Place samples in PBST-GS.
Shake at Room temperature for 02:00:00 .
Stain your samples with primary antibody for 30:00:00 .
Dilute the primary antibody in PBST-GS according to the manufacturer.
On the slide, circle the system of interest with a PAP pen and wait 00:02:00 for the circle to dry.
Place the slide flat into the humidity chamber.
Pipette the primary antibody solution on the circled system and incubate at 4 °C for 30:00:00 .
Wash four times in 1x PBST at Room temperature for 00:30:00 slowly on a linear.
Stain your samples with secondary antiboby for 30:00:00 .
Dilute the antibody in PBST-GS according to the manufacturer (keep solution and sample protected from the light!).
Incubate Overnight in darkness at 4 °C in the humidity chamber.
Wash four times in 1x PBST at Room temperature for 00:30:00 slowly on a linear shaker.
Dry as much as possible.
Circle the sample with vaseline to build a custom-made chamber.
Image your slides directly or store them at 4 °C .
Mount with mounting medium, cover with a coverslip.
creator: Marta Wawrzyniak
